queries.question: Which resource is the least expensive?
queries.sql: select TextbookTitle from textbooks_and_software order by price asc limit 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?textbooktitle WHERE {
  ?textbooks_and_software a :Textbooks_and_Software .
  ?textbooks_and_software p:TextbookTitle ?textbooktitle .
  ?textbooks_and_software p:Price ?price_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which resource is the least expensive?
queries.sql: select SoftwareName from textbooks_and_software order by price asc limit 1;
queries.sparql:

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?softwarename WHERE {
  ?textbooks_and_software a :Textbooks_and_Software .
  ?textbooks_and_software p:SoftwareName ?softwarename .
  ?textbooks_and_software p:Price ?price_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which resource is the least expensive?
queries.sql: select TextbookTitle, SoftwareName from textbooks_and_software order by price asc limit 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?textbooktitle ?softwarename WHERE {
  ?textbooks_and_software a :Textbooks_and_Software .
  ?textbooks_and_software p:TextbookTitle ?textbooktitle .
  ?textbooks_and_software p:SoftwareName ?softwarename .
  ?textbooks_and_software p:Price ?price_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: List the courses and their required softwares.
queries.sql: Select title, SoftwareName from courses C join textbooks_and_software TAS on C.courseID = TAS.courseID;

queries.question: List the courses and their required textbooks.
queries.sql: Select title, TextbookTitle from courses C join textbooks_and_software TAS on C.courseID = TAS.courseID;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?textbooktitle WHERE {
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?tas a :Textbooks_and_Software .
  ?tas p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?c p:Title ?title .
  ?tas p:TextbookTitle ?textbooktitle .
}

queries.question: List the courses and their required textbooks and softwares.
queries.sql: Select title, TextbookTitle, SoftwareName from courses C join textbooks_and_software TAS on C.courseID = TAS.courseID;
